approach: Confirm path resolution for SCRIPT_DIR after sourcing settings, then fix backend discovery.
escape: If the host environment has no coding CLI installed, fall back to manual prompt assembly and do not invent CLI flags.

task.name: fix-settings-path-leak
task.description: Ensure scripts/lib/settings.sh does not overwrite the caller's SCRIPT_DIR so scripts/backends/*.sh remain discoverable.

task.name: validate-prompt-soft-typecheck
task.description: Typecheck should warn for non-typed repos, not hard-fail, unless PROMPT_IMPROVER_REQUIRE_TYPECHECK=1.

check: Re-read every changed file under scripts/ and config/. Run smoke tests: bash scripts/smoke-test.sh No typecheck applicable (shell/markdown skill repo); use bash -n + validate-prompt. Report status for each requirement from the original request.
